description: Documents in difficult Arabic script, possibly Ottoman Turkish. The fragment on the right features an ink stamp: "قايم في ...٣٠٣", which may indicate the year 1303 AH (1884/85 CE). It is unclear how the stamp relates to the document, which may have been recorded roughly a century earlier based of [1]208 AH (1793/94 CE)in the scribe's own handwriting. Requires further examination.
